serverInfo.name: kye-protocol-reference
serverInfo.title: KYE Protocol Reference Gateway
serverInfo.description: Reference KYE Protocol Gateway exposing entity registration, delegations, capability grants, runtime authorize, audit chain, recovery flow, and webhook signing as MCP tools.

transport._comment: Live deployments substitute their own MCP transport URL. The reference deployment is illustrative.

tools.name: kye.register_entity
tools.title: Register entity
tools.description: Register a new entity (human, business, ai_agent, service, model, tool, workflow). Returns the entity URN.

tools.name: kye.create_delegation
tools.title: Create delegation
tools.description: Create a delegation: actor may act for subject, granted by delegator, within scope, for allowed_actions.

tools.name: kye.authorize
tools.title: Runtime authorize
tools.description: Ask the PDP whether actor may take action. Returns a signed PolicyDecision with reason codes and obligations.

tools.name: kye.invoke_capability
tools.title: Invoke capability
tools.description: Invoke a registered capability (skill / tool / mcp_tool / function / connector / playbook / model_profile). Gated by capability grants and runtime PDP.

tools.name: kye.point_in_time_audit
tools.title: Point-in-time audit replay
tools.description: Replay audit chain up to a sequence or timestamp; returns event_type counts and entity_last_event snapshot.

tools.name: kye.request_recovery
tools.title: Request recovery
tools.description: Open a recovery request for a subject entity. The decision step requires explicit approval.

tools.name: kye.report_compromise
tools.title: Report compromise
tools.description: File a compromise report. Downstream-derived authorities (delegations, payment authorities, access rights, capability grants, break-glass grants) become unusable; cascade algorithm is part of the patent track and is not disclosed in this repository.
